mechanism: Lag differentials between stages of the sequencing hierarchy generate a window where headline measures moderate (energy CPI fading at 1-3 months) while slower-moving channels (services/wages at 6-36 months) have not yet fully transmitted. This structural gap produces the false calm.
regime_dependence: Present in 5 of 7 major episodes; more pronounced when supply-driven (faster initial spike and fade) vs demand-pull (more gradual)
